test_cases.name: Initial_Generation_GroundTruth_1
test_cases.description: Generate a new wallet (Identity #1) using a simple password ('abc') to establish the deterministic output for this UUID.

expected_output.mnemonic: payment season kiss intact laundry refuse twenty apple sting brown disorder clump sing clap chat various core kiss found monkey place walk leaf bomb

test_cases.name: Uniqueness_Test
test_cases.description: Calling 'generate' again must produce a completely new, random UUID and thus different keys and mnemonic. (Identity #2)

expected_output.mnemonic: exile soft you scorpion unit echo daring wave quantum toddler spend people immense ginger fine mistake vintage stock harvest deal differ wagon stool review

test_cases.name: Restore_GroundTruth_1_Deterministic
test_cases.description: Restore Identity #1 using the original mnemonic and passphrase. Must deterministically match TC_001.
test_cases.command: ./mscikdf restore abc payment season kiss intact laundry refuse twenty apple sting brown disorder clump sing clap chat various core kiss found monkey place walk leaf bomb

input.mnemonic: payment season kiss intact laundry refuse twenty apple sting brown disorder clump sing clap chat various core kiss found monkey place walk leaf bomb

test_cases.name: Rekey_Operation
test_cases.description: Change the passphrase from 'abc' to 'cde' for Identity #1. This generates a new mnemonic from the re-sealed UUID.

input.old_mnemonic: payment season kiss intact laundry refuse twenty apple sting brown disorder clump sing clap chat various core kiss found monkey place walk leaf bomb

expected_output.new_mnemonic: shift release ranch online fluid power arrest safe puppy canyon secret maple broom cat item unhappy rug used tiger staff cram rubber come wreck

test_cases.name: Restore_After_Rekey
test_cases.description: Restore Identity #1 using the NEW mnemonic and the NEW passphrase ('cde'). The derived addresses must remain identical to TC_001, proving the underlying UUID is unchanged.
test_cases.command: ./mscikdf restore cde shift release ranch online fluid power arrest safe puppy canyon secret maple broom cat item unhappy rug used tiger staff cram rubber come wreck

input.mnemonic: shift release ranch online fluid power arrest safe puppy canyon secret maple broom cat item unhappy rug used tiger staff cram rubber come wreck

test_cases.name: Unicode_Password_Chinese
test_cases.description: Test password with Chinese characters ('测试'). Verifies Argon2id UTF-8 handling.

expected_output.mnemonic: visit cinnamon expire expose crop spell display exotic field provide glass jaguar salon abuse coffee observe worry stage uncle charge swift stuff buyer either

test_cases.name: Complex_Password_Emoji_GroundTruth_3
test_cases.description: Test password containing emojis and special symbols ('🔐2025'). Establishes Identity #3.

expected_output.mnemonic: range office dice close street little because keep disorder cook fame vast law roast police truth churn decline save cheap seed despair silent word

test_cases.name: Restore_Complex_Password
test_cases.description: Restore Identity #3 using the Emoji/Special Character password.
test_cases.command: ./mscikdf restore 🔐2025 range office dice close street little because keep disorder cook fame vast law roast police truth churn decline save cheap seed despair silent word

input.mnemonic: range office dice close street little because keep disorder cook fame vast law roast police truth churn decline save cheap seed despair silent word

test_cases.name: Rekey_Complex_to_Emoji
test_cases.description: Change the password for Identity #3 from '🔐2025' to a new Emoji password ('🔥🌍🔥').

input.old_mnemonic: range office dice close street little because keep disorder cook fame vast law roast police truth churn decline save cheap seed despair silent word

expected_output.new_mnemonic: tooth bag shuffle acoustic fork health write avoid tired goddess morning chicken element path prevent sea lab wisdom flower violin common network say virus

test_cases.name: Restore_After_Emoji_Rekey
test_cases.description: Restore Identity #3 using the NEW Emoji mnemonic and the NEW Emoji password. Addresses must match TC_007.
test_cases.command: ./mscikdf restore 🔥🌍🔥 tooth bag shuffle acoustic fork health write avoid tired goddess morning chicken element path prevent sea lab wisdom flower violin common network say virus

input.mnemonic: tooth bag shuffle acoustic fork health write avoid tired goddess morning chicken element path prevent sea lab wisdom flower violin common network say virus
